prompt: /tdd execute docs/plan.md — 5 tasks with mixed code/non-code and dependency ordering

assertions.text: Classifies tasks into code and non-code types
Routes code tasks through full TDD pipeline (RED→GREEN→reviews)
Routes non-code tasks through implementer dispatch (spec-compliance + code-quality only)
Uses eager dispatch (DAG-based, not rigid batches)
Calls update-state.ts for both code and non-code units
Phase 5 holistic review covers cross-task integration
